vllm.title: [doc][misc] clarify VLLM_HOST_IP for multi-node inference
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: As more and more people are trying deepseek models with multi-node inference, #7815 becomes more frequent. Let's give clear message to users.

vllm.title: [Doc] Deprecate Discord
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Our slack is becoming much more mature nowadays. We would like to deprecate Discord and encourage all of vLLM users and developers to use vLLM Slack.

vllm.title: make sure mistral_common not imported for non-mistral models
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When people use deepseek models, they find that they need to solve cv2 version conflict, see https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/21064432691 .
I added the check, and make all imports of cv2 lazy.

vllm.title: Properly check if all fused layers are in the list of targets
vllm.author: eldarkurtic

vllm.title: Fix for attention layers to remain unquantized during moe_wn16 quant
vllm.author: srikanthsrnvs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix to AWQ quant loading of the new R1 model
The new optimized MoE kernels for a large number of experts moe_wn16 uses AWQ quant which requires the attention layers to be in 16bit
The current merge has broken this, and the get_quant_method must return None for it to work correctly again
